mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emp (image, username, name, gender, job, entry_date, dept_id, phone, salary) VALUES (#{image}, #{username}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{job}, #{entryDate}, #{deptId}, #{phone}, #{salary})
INSERT INTO emp_expr (emp_id, company, job, begin, end) VALUES (#{empId}, #{company}, #{job}, #{begin}, #{end})
